analysis.summary: The technician accessed the 3CX Admin Console, reviewed the updates status, navigated to the Users section, opened the profile for user 'Devesh Bhattacharya' (extension 326), and generated a QR code for the 3CX app provisioning. The QR code pop-up was then closed, and the technician proceeded to view the Team status page, where multiple users were listed as 'Not registered'.
actions_taken: Navigated to the 'Users' section in the 3CX Admin Console.
Scrolled through the list of users (extensions 200-332).
Opened the profile for user 'Devesh Bhattacharya' (extension 326).
Generated a QR code for 3CX app provisioning for user 326.
Navigated to the 'Team' section to view user statuses.
issues_observed: A persistent banner stating 'A new update is available' was displayed at the top, despite the 'Updates' section indicating 'You're up to date'.
Multiple users listed as 'Not registered' on the 'Team' page.
notable_events: Generated a QR code for provisioning the 3CX app for a specific user (extension 326).

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician navigated purposefully and efficiently through the 3CX Admin Console, performing specific actions without hesitation or apparent uncertainty.
